description_long: This is a tall, rectangular vending machine with a metallic silver frame and bright yellow front panel. The front features a large illuminated display with a coffee cup graphic, coffee beans, and the brand name 'KORAL' at the top. Below the display, there is a yellow panel with the text 'Take Out Premium Coffee' and a stylized coffee cup illustration. The right side of the front panel contains a vertical row of product selection buttons, a payment interface with coin and bill acceptors, and a product retrieval slot at the bottom. The sides of the machine are plain yellow, while the back is a solid gray with ventilation grilles near the base. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for placement in urban public spaces.
description: A tall, silver and yellow vending machine with a coffee-themed front display, product selection buttons, payment interface, and retrieval slot. The sides are plain yellow, and the back is gray with ventilation.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, showing a plain yellow panel with a vertical seam and a small metallic label near the bottom.
description_view_1: The front view displays the illuminated coffee-themed panel, product selection buttons, payment interface, retrieval slot, and prominent branding.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, features a plain yellow panel with a vertical seam and a small metallic label near the bottom.
description_view_3: The back of the machine is solid gray with a vented section at the bottom, lacking any branding or interactive features.
attribute_display_panel: A large, illuminated display panel is located on the upper front, rectangular in shape, showing a coffee cup, coffee beans, and branding.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface on the right front includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all vertically aligned below the selection buttons.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual, rectangular buttons with labels is present on the right front, allowing product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular retrieval slot is located at the bottom right of the front panel, beneath the payment interface, with a metallic flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes the 'KORAL' logo at the top of the display, a large yellow panel with 'Take Out Premium Coffee' and a coffee cup graphic, all on the front.
